overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a character navigating a war-torn futuristic cityscape with orange barricades, military vehicles, and distinctive architecture. The sequence shows descent through construction zones, crossing an open plaza with a purple geometric building, and approaching two NPCs for interaction under bright daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: barricaded stairway descent through construction zone

events.description: beginning descent down concrete stairs into barricaded construction area
reaching bottom of initial stairway and continuing forward through barricades

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete stairs flanked by orange construction barricades and sandbag piles

entered.detail: tall orange plastic barriers lining both sides of the path
wide concrete staircase with metal railings
wrecked cars and debris scattered in the background

segments.scene_description: The character begins descending a wide concrete staircase into a construction zone lined with orange plastic barricades. Green sandbags pile up on the left while damaged vehicles sit in the distance. The path is narrow and enclosed by the surrounding destruction.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower level plaza with sandbag fortifications and stair ascent

events.description: descending to lower level with debris and destroyed vehicles
turning around sandbags and beginning ascent up secondary stairway

agents.ego_description: navigating around sandbags at the lower level and ascending a second set of stairs toward the plaza

notable_agents.action: NPC in red helmet and tactical armor descending the stairs in the opposite direction

entered.detail: rusted metal railings along the concrete stairs
fortified wall of sandbags blocking part of the path
crushed blue and yellow vehicle debris with exposed internals

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a lower level filled with destroyed vehicle wreckage and sandbag fortifications. After navigating around the barriers, the character turns and ascends a second staircase, passing an NPC in red armor coming down the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with military tank and futuristic pyramid building

events.description: emerging from stairs into open plaza with clear sky and full visibility
passing burning vehicle wreckage with visible flames and black smoke

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza past a military tank and toward a distinctive purple geometric building

notable_agents.action: armed guard standing near the tank watching the area

entered.detail: large green military tank with treads and cannon parked on the plaza tiles
large pyramid-shaped building with purple glass panels and green neon framework
vehicle engulfed in flames with thick black smoke rising
tall palm trees scattered throughout the plaza area

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a wide-open plaza under bright sunlight, the character walks past a large military tank on the left and a burning vehicle in the distance. A striking purple geometric dome building rises on the right, surrounded by palm trees and futuristic architecture.

events.description: slowing down to approach the two standing NPCs
initiating interaction with NPCs, camera focuses on their conversation and gestures

agents.ego_description: approaching two NPCs conversing on the walkway, standing with them as one gestures with a tablet device

notable_agents.action: NPC with wide-brimmed hat and pink shirt holding a tablet, gesturing while speaking to the other NPC
NPC with tactical vest and green pants, listening and responding to the conversation

entered.detail: low orange plastic barriers lining the walkway edge
tall building with neon signs and glass windows

segments.scene_description: The character approaches two NPCs standing and conversing on the pedestrian walkway. One wears a wide-brimmed hat and gestures with a tablet device while talking to the other, who wears a tactical vest. The purple geometric building remains visible in the background as the interaction begins.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, war-torn construction zone into a bright, expansive futuristic plaza. It begins with the character descending a wide concrete staircase lined with orange plastic barricades and green sandbags, moving through a narrow path of urban destruction. As the character reaches the lower level, the camera navigates through vehicle wreckage and fortifications before ascending a second staircase and passing an NPC in red armor. The scene then opens into a wide-open plaza under bright sunlight, passing a military tank and a burning vehicle while a striking purple geometric dome rises among palm trees on the right. Finally, the camera glides toward two NPCs conversing on a pedestrian walkway, with one gesturing with a tablet against the backdrop of the futuristic architecture.
